title: Settings
subtitle: Manage default format, download path, concurrency, cookies, and tool versions.
cookie_hint: Paste Netscape-format cookies. Imports are validated for format, domain match, and expiry.
cookie_scope_hint: Each platform keeps its own cookie file; imports automatically discard entries that do not belong to the selected platform.

cookie_issues.missing: No cookies have been imported for this platform.
cookie_issues.empty_file: No cookie records were found in the provided content.
cookie_issues.parse_error: The cookie file is not valid Netscape cookie format.
cookie_issues.domain_mismatch: The imported content does not contain cookies for the selected platform.
cookie_issues.expired: All matched cookies have already expired.
cookie_issues.unsupported_platform: This platform is not supported for cookie import.
cookie_issues.read_error: The saved cookie file could not be read. Re-import it.

cookie_verify_issues.missing: There is no cookie file available to verify for this platform.
cookie_verify_issues.empty_file: The cookie file is empty and cannot be verified online.
cookie_verify_issues.parse_error: The cookie file format is invalid for online verification.
cookie_verify_issues.domain_mismatch: The cookie does not match the selected platform.
cookie_verify_issues.expired: The cookie has expired and cannot pass online verification.
cookie_verify_issues.unsupported_platform: This platform does not support online verification.
cookie_verify_issues.read_error: The cookie file could not be read.
cookie_verify_issues.login_required: The platform did not recognize the cookie as logged in.
cookie_verify_issues.network_error: The verification request failed due to a network error.

best.label: Best Available
best.hint: Automatically picks the highest video quality available.

worst.label: Lowest Available
worst.hint: Picks the lowest video quality to save space and bandwidth.

bestaudio.label: Best Audio Only
bestaudio.hint: Downloads the best audio stream only, no video.
